title: hydrocotyle peltiformis
intro: Hydrocotyle peltiformis, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocotylaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle peltiformis include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory and concentration, and reduced symptoms of anxiety and depression. Hydrocotyle peltiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and modern supplements to promote overall well-being.
